title: TMasters Texture
description: Official TMaster texture pack that changes the GUI to a colorful red.
body:
The Official TMaster Resource Pack

The Official TMaster Resource Pack brings a bold and stylish new look to your Minecraft experience. Designed with a strong red and black theme, this pack gives your game a clean, modern, and powerful appearance while keeping the classic Minecraft feeling intact.

The main highlight of this resource pack is the redesigned hotbar. It transforms the standard hotbar into a beautiful, colorful red interface that immediately stands out. The smooth color tones and clean design make your inventory feel more dynamic and energetic. Whether you're building, fighting mobs, or exploring new worlds, the new hotbar design adds a fresh and unique touch to your gameplay.

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b91189d27da17d1590fea80cf70be21f5ed33000.png)

This pack is perfect for players who love a strong visual identity and want their UI to match a bold personality. The red tones are carefully balanced — not too bright, not too dark — creating a clean and professional look that fits both PvP and survival gameplay.

The TMaster Resource Pack is lightweight, simple to install, and fully compatible with the standard Minecraft experience. It doesn’t overload your game with unnecessary changes but focuses on improving the visual style of essential UI elements.
